steps.title: Identify the scale factor
steps.content: Each side of rectangle NPQR is $7$ times the corresponding side of rectangle JKLM, so the linear scale factor is $7$.

steps.title: Square the scale factor
steps.content:
Areas of similar figures scale by the square of the linear scale factor:
$$7^2=49$$

steps.title: Find the larger area
steps.content:
Multiply the original area by the area scale factor:
$$74\cdot 49=3{,}626$$

steps.title: State the area
steps.content: The area of rectangle NPQR is $3{,}626$ square units. The answer is 3626.
